segments.text: Make the good enough list. Make a list
of the few factors that that are good
enough for you to jump into action. So,
let's say I'm a corporate professional
who's been meaning to start creating
content. I'm also somebody who's
passionate about videography, but I've
been overthinking creating content for a
long time now. This is what my good
enough list could look like. My good
enough list will have I need to make
sure that my video is shot with a back
camera of my phone at 4K 30fps. The
second criteria that I could have is it
needs to be recorded on a good
microphone and the audio needs to be
crystal clear. The third criteria in my
list could be that my video needs to
solve a problem for other videographers.
Now once these three boxes are checked
in my good enough list, I just close my
eyes and press post. And that's it.
That's what we do when we're all
thinking about a present situation.
[Music]
